description_long: This is a medium-sized wooden storage box with a cubic shape, constructed from horizontal wooden planks that are visibly nailed together. The wood has a natural, slightly weathered brown finish, and the grain and texture of the wood are clearly visible, giving it a rustic appearance. On one side, there is a large white adhesive shipping label and a smaller red sticker, suggesting it has been used for shipping or storage purposes. The top of the box is flat and appears to be a removable lid, with no visible hinges or handles. The box sits on a black grid-patterned mat with red lines, which is likely for scale reference. The overall construction looks sturdy, suitable for use in garages, warehouses, or urban storage areas.
description: A medium-sized, rustic wooden storage box with a flat removable lid and visible shipping labels, constructed from horizontal planks and finished in natural brown.
description_view_0: The front view shows the plain wooden face of the box with horizontal planks and a small red sticker on the top surface.
description_view_1: This side reveals a faint circular marking on the wood, possibly a faded stamp, with no labels or stickers visible.
description_view_2: The rear view displays another plain wooden face, similar to the front, with no visible markings or labels.
description_view_3: This side features a large white adhesive shipping label and a smaller red sticker on the top, indicating prior use for shipping or storage.
attribute_labeling_or_signage: adhesive label, printed shipping label, small red sticker
